### TC-CON-004: Regression — Existing account workflows unaffected by this feature

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **TC ID** | TC-CON-004 |

**Preconditions:**
- Solution containing this feature deployed to the regression environment.

**Test Steps:**
| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Execute existing account Create / Read / Update / Delete operations using a baseline test script | All baseline operations still pass |
| 2 | Open existing OOB views on the entity | Views render with correct columns; no errors |
| 3 | Run any existing Power Automate flows / plugins on the entity | Existing automation runs without regression |

**Post-conditions:**
- No baseline test failures introduced by this feature.

**Test Data:**
- Baseline test data fixture for account.

**Notes:**
Run before every deployment per Constitution §07 DevOps & ALM.
